section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has high blood pressure.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is phrased as a factual existing condition rather than an interpretive diagnostic impression or synthesis; it functions more as an objective problem list item than an assessment statement.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is attempting to lower their blood pressure.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes the patient's ongoing self-management behavior/effort, which is subjective history rather than diagnostic assessment or plan.
